Headline: #57 Laramie Temporary Reroute at Laramie/Grand
ShortDescription: 57 Laramie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Laramie/Grand.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#57 Laramie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Laramie, North Avenue, Cicero, and Grand into the terminal, due to street blockage near Laramie/Grand.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #111 111th/King Drive Temporary Reroute near 115th/Watkins
ShortDescription: 111 111th/King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 115th/Watkins.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#111 111th/King Drive buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 115th/Watkins.

Southbound buses will operate via 111th, Monterey, Marshfield, 115th and over regular route.

Northbound buses will operate via Marshfield, 119th, Ashland, 112th Place, Vincennes and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #151 Sheridan Temporary Reroute at Sheridan/Wilson
ShortDescription: 151 Sheridan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Sheridan/Wilson.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#151 Sheridan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Sheridan, Lawrence, Clarendon, Wilson, Sheridan and over normal route, due to street blockage near Sheridan/Wilson.

Allow extra travel time.
